problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
hypothesis: If Liquid crystal elastomer actuation is applied to formation, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
